highlights.text: My general lean is to defer to the trend.
My core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
Failed Breakdowns are the footprint of institutional accumulation and occur when ES goes elevator down and flushes a low.
I wrote last Friday November 21st at 4pm: “Bulls attempted a recovery though today by putting in a big Failed Breakdown of 6540-42, and building a base.
I was looking for more upside for the rest of the week, but we would need another Failed Breakdown to propel it.
On Tuesday at 9:40AM Tuesday, we flushed 6701 (there was a big shelf of lows there set on Monday/early Tuesday) to 6675, then recovered 6701 for a Failed Breakdown.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into Failed Breakdowns we had on Monday and Tuesday that fueled this leg up (both were great quality and good to learn from).

post_title: 5 Green Days In A Row For SPX. Will SPX Return To Reality Next Week? Dec 1st Plan
